\cvrow{TECHNICAL\\SKILLS}{
  \vspace{-8pt}
  \begin{itemize}
  \item \textbf{Programming Languages:} Python, C/C++, Julia, MATLAB/Simulink
  \item \textbf{Frameworks \& Libraries:} JAX, PyTorch, CasADi, acados, ROS 2, ArduPilot
  \item \textbf{Development \& DevOps Tools:} Docker, Continuous Integration, Git/GitHub
  \item \textbf{Hardware \& Experimentation:} UAV assembly, embedded firmware deployment
  \item \textbf{Motion-Capture:} OptiTrack and Vicon
  \item \textbf{Languages:} Spanish (Native), English (Native)
  \end{itemize}%
}
